dialogues: Same items, two different pictures. What's going on here? Let's start with the one you already know.
Let's warm up. Check out these bags. Build the equation.
Check out these two pictures. Both show 15 items -- 3 groups of 5. But look at the one on the right. Something's different about how it's set up. What do you notice?
Right. Everything's lined up. Same groups, but now every item has its own spot in the arrangement.
That lined-up arrangement you just made? It has a name. And there's a lot we can figure out about how it works. Let's dive in.
